an2.260-264:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these two qualities that result in suffering. What two? (260) Anger and hostility … (261) Denigration and insolence … (262) Envy and miserliness … (263) Deceitfulness and craftiness … (264) Moral shamelessness and moral recklessness. These are the two qualities that result in suffering."
